next_aureon_actions: Keep IFS 10210100 open only for readback until Swiss partner, research institute or waiver, Innosuisse status, budget split, permit/licence, export-control, finance and Project Impact evidence exists.
Use academic validation material for partner outreach only after exact target and payload approval.
Do not import the RA Grant War Room package directly into IFS; sanitize sensitive values and internal language before any reuse.
Re-run targeted Drive/local/Gmail evidence search after any partner reply, commitment letter, budget, support letter, receipt or portal update appears.
